from typing import List, Dict

class MusicAlbum:
    def __init__(self, name: str, positive_aspects: List[str], negative_aspects: List[str], user_preference_elements: List[str]):
        self.name = name
        self.positive_aspects = positive_aspects
        self-negative_aspects = negative_aspects
        self.user_preference_elements = user_preference_elements

    def analyze_user_like(self, user_preferences: List[str]) -> bool:
        user_likes = True
        for aspect in self.positive_aspects:
            if aspect not in user_preferences:
                user_likes = False
                break
        return user_likes
